lockingPolicy.lockReason: Bugfix-fastlane real client fix; scenarios drive the source-contract guard green plus the adversarial re-RED.

tdd.redGreenEvidence: report.md '## Test Evidence': TestWebAssistantRobustnessGuard_BUG_073_002 passes against the fixed assistant.js; stripping the inFlight guard + AbortController + signal makes it FAIL naming the missing mechanisms (re-RED); the adversarial twin proves the guard is non-tautological.

scenarios.title: Web assistant client wires single-flight guard + AbortController timeout + busy affordance
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: The committed web/pwa/assistant.js source contains new AbortController(, signal: controller.signal, if (inFlight) (>=2 sites), .disabled = busy, and TURN_TIMEOUT_MS (>=2); the guard passes.

scenarios.title: Robustness guard detects a regression (adversarial)
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: A synthetic regressed client (no AbortController, no signal, no inFlight, no busy toggle, no TURN_TIMEOUT_MS) fails every required pattern's minimum-hit contract.

scenarios.title: Regression: storage guard still forbids bearer/session persistence
scenarios.liveTestExpectation: The robustness changes introduce no forbidden browser-storage API; the storage guard stays green.
